Trump Signs Executive Order on Psychedelic Drug Access for Veterans | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Donald Trump has signed an executive order to accelerate access to psychedelic drug treatments for U.S. veterans[1]. This announcement was made on April 18, 2026, and represents a concrete policy action that could impact healthcare policy, pharmaceutical development, and veterans' benefits mark

signals.headline: Solana Stablecoin Supply Surges 15x to $3
signals.raw:
Solana Stablecoin Supply Surges 15x to $3.8B, Surpassing Ethereum in February 2026 Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Non-USDC/USDT stablecoin supply on Solana jumped 15x since January 2025 to $3.8B, signaling real capital inflows, while Solana processed a record $650B in volume in February 2026 vs. Ethereum's $525–551B[1][4]. This coincides with Solana's DEX volume leading all Layer 1/Layer 2 net
